global.title: mcp workflows
global.content:
# mcp workflows

Workflows and sequencing rules for interacting with the reactor-mcp toolset.

## Schema-First Rule
- [[always check document model schema before calling addActions]] — prevents failed calls from missing required parameters

## Batch Operations
- [[batch multiple actions in a single addActions call to minimize round trips]] — combine related operations

## Two-Step Modification
- [[document model changes require both MCP update and src file update]] — never skip either step

## Document Creation
- [[document IDs are auto-generated by createDocument never set manually]] — let the system generate IDs
- [[document models must be added to the vetra drive by default]] — source documents go to vetra drive
- [[present document model proposals to user before implementing]] — planning phase is mandatory

## App Creation
- [[SET_APP_STATUS with CONFIRMED triggers code generation for apps]] — CONFIRMED status kicks off generation

## Drive Operations
- [[delete nodes with DELETE_NODE not DELETE_FILE]] — correct operation name for removing nodes
- [[vetra drive holds source documents while preview drive holds instances]] — two drives, different purposes

## Reducer Code via MCP
- [[reducer code goes into SET_OPERATION_REDUCER without function headers]] — body only, no wrapper
- [[external imports go in src reducer files not in SET_OPERATION_REDUCER]] — imports in src/ only

## Prerequisites
- [[reactor-mcp must be running before document operations]] — user must start with `ph vetra`

## Reference
- [[document models have 37 available operations across 7 categories]] — full operation taxonomy

---

Topics:
- [[index]]
global.description: reactor-mcp tool sequencing, batch operations, and the two-step document modification rule
